since_last: 80% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.64%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.13% · BTC +1.06% · Gold -0.98% · Nasdaq100 +2.15%. 80% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.64%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.64%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.55%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -49.53%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +11.77%, AMAT +11.07%, LRCX +8.60%, PANW +8.16%, TSLA +7.89%. Laggards: HON -49.53%, SMCI -6.69%, DLR -2.17%, SOUN -1.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.21% at $161.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
